description: A visualizer to import data in MAGE-ML format into GenePattern
author: Joshua Gould, Broad Institute
plan:
## MAGEMLImportViewer GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
MAGEMLImportViewer is a GenePattern module that A visualizer to import data in MAGE-ML format into GenePattern

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 1 parameters:
- Required: input.filename
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -Dedu.mit.broad.modules.mage.dtd\=<libdir>MAGE-ML.dtd20020814 -cp <libdir>gp-modules.jar<path.separator><libdir>xercesImpl.jar<path.separator><libdir>MAGEstk-2004-11-29-v1.1-compatible.jar<path.separator><libdir>MAGEMLImporter.jar<path.separator><libdir>tar.jar edu.mit.broad.modules.mage.MAGEMLImportViewer <input.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.filename
parameters.description: The archive file containing the MAGE-ML files - .tar, .tgz, .tar.gz, .zip, .gz
